Run the interactive REPL

Source: R/repl.R
codeagent_console.Rd

Run the interactive REPL

Usage

codeagent_console(
  client,
  stream = TRUE,
  prompt_str = "› ",
  con = NULL,
  session_id = NULL,
  quiet = FALSE
)

Arguments

client

A CodeagentClient.

stream

Logical. Stream responses token-by-token.

prompt_str

Character. The input prompt shown each turn.

con

Connection to read lines from (default stdin; override in tests).

session_id

Character or NULL. Session id for auto-save (generated if NULL).

quiet

Logical. Suppress the startup banner and settings warnings (used in tests and non-interactive contexts where the output would be noise).

Value

Invisibly the session id. Loops until /exit or EOF.

On this page
